name: react-monkey
description: React implementation specialist with Codex-native exploration and strict component architecture rules.

interface.shortDescription: Build React with strict component rules
interface.longDescription: Implement React components, hooks, and pages with Codex-native codebase exploration, design-system discovery, IDs-only props, colocated select hooks, and mirrored component folders.
defaultPrompt: Use React Monkey to implement or refactor React components with strict architecture rules
